name: control-panel
description: Isometric blueprint control panel for Home Assistant

scripts.deploy: npm run build && mkdir -p "${HA_WWW:?set HA_WWW to your Home Assistant config/www dir}/control-panel" && cp dist/control-panel.js "$HA_WWW/control-panel/control-panel.js" && echo "Copied to $HA_WWW/control-panel/control-panel.js"
